mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sentiment_timeline (task_id, bvid, timeline_json, aspect_sentiment_json, created_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{bvid}, #{timelineJson}, #{aspectSentimentJson}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE timeline_json = VALUES(timeline_json), aspect_sentiment_json = VALUES(aspect_sentiment_json), created_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT timeline_id AS timelineId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, timeline_json AS timelineJson, aspect_sentiment_json AS aspectSentimentJson, created_at AS createdAt FROM sentiment_timeline WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
